import type { SerovalNodeType } from './constants'; import type { SerovalNode } from './types'; type ExtractedNodeType<T extends SerovalNodeType> = Extract< SerovalNode, { t: T } >; export function createSerovalNode< T extends SerovalNodeType, N extends ExtractedNodeType<T>, >( t: T, i: N['i'], s: N['s'], c: N['c'], m: N['m'], p: N['p'], e: N['e'], a: N['a'], f: N['f'], b: N['b'], o: N['o'], l: N['l'], ): N { return { t, i, s, c, m, p, e, a, f, b, o, l, } as N; }
